name: Linear
description: Linear — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in issue tracking.

seo.title: Linear Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Linear analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Linear is a CRM / Lifecycle Automation tool.
pros: Centralizes customer data and automates lifecycle messaging
cons: Contact-based pricing scales steeply with list growth
review.best_for: SaaS and e-commerce teams managing user journeys
review.not_for: Single-product apps with no ongoing user engagement
